title: Erroring Entity Remover Reforged
description: Removes entities that throw errors and crash the game while ticking. Forge Version
body:
This is a Forge version of The_Fireplace's Errorying Entity Remover Fabric mod, this was created as Forge removed their built-in option for this.

This mod removes entities that throw errors and crash the game while ticking. Warning: Use at your own risk. This should generally be used as a last resort, and if the crash is clearly caused by a mod, you should report it so the author can fix it.
